infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: InstaSales AI uses the camera to capture new photos inside the app for your projects.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: InstaSales AI uses the microphone to record audio clips that stay with your in-app creations.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: InstaSales AI uses speech recognition to turn your spoken words into text inside the app.
